summary: 把任意静态 HTML 转成可视化编辑版：注入可拖动工具栏、颜色/字号/布局/风格面板、就地文字编辑、撤销保存导出干净版、元素与面板双向跳转、中英文 i18n、6 套场景风格 Prompt 一键复制给 AI 重塑样式。颜色面板数据驱动：扫 DOM 文字字符数 top 5 + 背景元素数 top 4 + 边框元素数...

latestVersion.changelog:
Turn any static HTML into a visually editable page: click text to edit inline, adjust colors / fonts / layout from a side panel, copy style prompts to paste into any AI for restyling, and export a clean HTML in one click.

Key upgrades since v1.0.0:

The color panel has been rewritten from "guess by variable name" to data-driven. It scans every DOM text node and aggregates color usage weighted by character count: top 5 text colors, top 4 backgrounds, top 3 borders. Works for any theme — blue, red, green, dark — without code changes. Labels follow frequency semantics: Primary / Secondary / Highlight / Accent / Subtle. Multiple CSS variables sharing the same hex are linked automatically.

The font-size panel was collapsed from 25 items to 10 or fewer, organized into 3 tiers: Heading / Body / Auxiliary. Same-family selectors like strong, upcoming, event, data are merged, eliminating clutter.

The layout panel adds a Line Height slider, for 7 items total: Page Width / Page Padding / Lead Width / Line Height / Section Gap / Card Gap / Card Padding.

Style presets are rewritten from "click to apply CSS" to "click to copy an AI prompt." Six scenario cards (Cloud Native / Swiss Grid / Editorial Magazine / Sunlit Warmth / Terminal Hacker / Y2K Kawaii) copy a complete prompt — style description, palette hex, hard constraints — to clipboard. Paste into any AI to rewrite the CSS.

A draggable toolbar is added. Defaults to the top-right corner, can be dragged anywhere, position persisted in localStorage.

The language switcher now uses dual-display "中 / EN" — both languages are always visible, the active one highlighted and the inactive one dimmed. Any language user immediately understands how to switch.

A pinned tooltip is added. Hover any element to see its adjustable properties; press P to pin. Each row shows a swatch and current value. The tooltip detects whether the element uses colors not in the panel and branches by source type: inline hardcoded colors get an orange "Extract as variable" button (smart-named like --text-purple, rewrites DOM inline to var() for immediate live coupling); colors from CSS rules, parent inheritance, or complex expressions get a blue "Copy prompt for AI" button (copies a semantic refactor prompt with the element selector).

Export Clean (ε scheme) is added. One click strips the toolbar, panel, editor JS / CSS, but keeps data-editable so the file can be re-adapted later. All inline var(--xxx) references are automatically restored to hex, so clipping a snippet to Notion / email / WeChat preserves colors.

Compatibility is relaxed. Inline-style-heavy HTML used to be rejected; now text editing and the data-driven color panel still work, with a suggestion to use Style Prompt to let an AI refactor inline styles into CSS variables first.

Sanity checks expanded to 20+ items: mapping consistency, font-size coverage, editable coverage, injection order, no personal path leaks. Bad checks block output, preventing broken files.

One-line usage:
pip install beautifulsoup4
python scripts/adapt.py your-report.html


把任意静态 HTML 变成可视化编辑版：点击文字直接修改、面板调整颜色 / 字号 / 布局、复制风格 Prompt 给 AI 让 AI 重塑样式、一键导出干净 HTML。

相比 v1.0.0 的核心升级：

颜色面板从"猜变量名"升级为数据驱动。自动扫描 DOM 所有文字节点，按字符数加权聚合：文字色 top 5、背景色 top 4、边框色 top 3。蓝主题、红主题、绿主题、深色模式都自动适配。按使用频次命名为「主要 / 次要 / 强调 / 装饰 / 偶用」。同色多变量自动联动。

字号面板从 25 项收敛到 10 项以内，分 3 组：标题层级 / 正文层级 / 辅助。自动合并 strong / upcoming / event / data 等同族选择器，不再堆砌。

布局面板新增「行高」滑块，共 7 项：页面宽度 / 左右内距 / 段落最大宽 / 行高 / 章节间距 / 卡片间距 / 卡片内边距。

风格预设从「点击改 CSS」改造为「复制 Prompt 给 AI」。6 张场景卡片（云原生企业 / 瑞士网格 / 杂志编辑 / 阳光手账 / 终端骇客 / Y2K 可爱数字），点击后把完整风格描述、色板、硬约束的 Prompt 复制到剪贴板，粘贴给任意 AI 即可重写 CSS。

新增可拖动工具栏。默认右上角，可拖到任意位置，位置写入 localStorage 永久记住。

新增「中 / EN」双显语言切换。两种语言始终都显示，激活态高亮，未激活半透明。任何语言用户都能一眼看懂如何切换。

新增 Pinned 元素弹窗。Hover 任意元素查看可调项，按 P 固定后弹窗每行带色块和数值。检测元素颜色是否在面板中未提取，按类型分流：inline 写死的色提供「一键提取为变量」按钮（智能命名为 --text-purple 等，直接改 DOM 立即联动）；CSS 规则、父级继承、复杂表达式的色提供「复制提示让 AI 改」按钮（复制带选择器的语义化 Prompt 给 AI）。

新增导出干净版（ε 方案）。一键剥离工具栏、面板、编辑器 JS / CSS，保留 data-editable 属性方便日后再次 adapt。inline 的 var(--xxx) 自动还原为 hex，剪贴片段到 Notion、邮件、微信不丢失颜色。

兼容性放宽。原来"几乎全是 inline style 的 HTML"会被拒绝生成；现在文字编辑和数据驱动颜色面板仍可用，并提示用户用 Style Prompt 让 AI 先把 inline 重构为 CSS 变量。

Sanity Checks 升级。20+ 项自动校验：mapping 一致性、字号覆盖、可编辑覆盖、注入顺序、无个人路径泄漏。检查不过不输出文件，避免生成坏件。

一行使用：
pip install beautifulsoup4
python scripts/adapt.py your-report.html
